situation: 我最近想开始理财，但不知道从哪开始。
rubric: does not assume local data
asks one key question or offers 2-3 finance lenses
recommends one lens with reason
lets the user choose before applying
does not jump directly into investing advice
does not ask for full household data
does not mention weekly review
expected_behavior: asks one key question or offers 2-3 finance lenses
lets the user choose before applying
avoid_behavior: does not jump directly into investing advice
does not ask for full household data

situation: 我想开始运动，但总坚持不下来。
rubric: offers movement lenses such as tiny habits, aerobic base, or strength baseline
recommends tiny habits if consistency is the blocker
lets the user choose
keeps first step lightweight
does not prescribe a full training plan immediately
does not mention 7-day review without data
expected_behavior: offers movement lenses such as tiny habits, aerobic base, or strength baseline
recommends tiny habits if consistency is the blocker
avoid_behavior: does not prescribe a full training plan immediately
does not mention 7-day review without data

situation: 我和伴侣最近老是因为家务吵架，我想说清楚但不想又吵起来。
rubric: detects family or relationship domain
offers 2-3 family lenses such as NVC and Gottman-style
recommends de-escalation before problem solving
lets the user choose before applying
does not decide who is right
mentions safety boundary without overreacting

situation: 孩子写作业总拖，我不想吼他，但也不能一直让步。
rubric: detects parenting boundary context
offers positive-discipline-style as a candidate
recommends kind firmness if boundary is the blocker
lets the user choose
does not shame the child or parent
does not propose weekly review without history

situation: 我想健康一点，但不想搞复杂计划，也不想每天打卡一堆东西。
rubric: detects health lifestyle domain
offers gentle health lenses
recommends blue-zones-style or another low-pressure lens with reason
asks one question if needed
lets the user choose
does not provide diagnosis or treatment
